summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Demo Club Corrections (Iteration 12). All 9 core features verified working correctly via 11 backend API tests (100% pass) and 9 Playwright UI tests (100% pass).
seed_data_creation: Demo data pre-seeded: John Smith (Tab #123, VIP), Kevin Brown (Tab #125, Blocked), Alex Turner (Tab #126), Maria Lopez (no tab), plus 8 tables in main/vip/patio zones
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Demo Club Corrections features verified working. Backend APIs return correct tab_number and guest_status. Frontend displays Tab #, Blocked badges, and all 5 KDS columns.

features_tested.2_venue_home_modules: ✅ Modules dropdown shows: Pulse, TAP, Table, KDS (Kitchen), Manager, Owner
features_tested.3_pulse_inside_page: ✅ Shows 4 guests with Tab # and status: John Smith (Tab #123, VIP), Kevin Brown (Tab #125, Blocked), Maria Lopez (no tab), JJJ
features_tested.4_tap_page: ✅ Menu catalog with categories (Cocktails, Beers, Spirits, Non-alcoholic, Mains, Starters, Snacks). Open tabs: John Smith #123, Kevin Brown #125, Alex Turner #126
features_tested.5_table_page: ✅ 8 tables in zones (main/vip/patio). Table 2 Occupied (John Smith, Tab #123), Table 3 Occupied (Alex Turner, Tab #126). Available tables show green status
features_tested.6_kitchen_kds: ✅ Kanban board with 5 columns: Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed. Demo tickets showing
features_tested.7_bar_page: ✅ Bar catalog with categories (Cocktails, Beers, Spirits, Non-alcoholic). USD prices displayed
features_tested.8_guest_registration: ✅ Birthday field always visible and marked as (optional). Manual Entry opens registration form
features_tested.9_custom_item_bar: ✅ Custom button opens form with 4 categories: Cocktails, Beers, Spirits, Non-alcoholic

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/venue/home - Returns modules list with enabled status
GET /api/pulse/inside - Returns guests with tab_number and guest_status
GET /api/tap/catalog - Returns menu items with categories and USD prices
GET /api/tap/sessions - Returns open tabs with tab_number
screenshots: .screenshots/04_pulse_inside.png - Inside page with Tab # and Blocked badge
.screenshots/05_tap_page.png - TAP page with open tabs and categories
.screenshots/06_table_page.png - Table page with zones and occupied status
.screenshots/08_bar_page_custom.png - Bar page with custom item form
